title: HM Courts and Tribunals Service Board meeting 13 March 2025
body: "The meeting discussed items including:   Audit & Risk Assurance Committee (ARAC) Update CEO Report Performance & Finance Updates Spending Review – Phase 2 Productivity Stock Take and Recommendations; Unit cost; Tracking Partner Delays in the Justice System Deep Dive on the Immigration & Asylum Chamber (IAC) Artificial Intelligence (AI) Adoption at HMCTS  "
